supportLists.listTitle: Scoped pathway section: Required MIS Courses (prerequisites in parentheses)

requirementCueLines: CSS 173 – Fundamentals of Programming Theory and Applications
(CSS 142 and corequisite CSSSKL 142; CSE 122; or CSE 142)
CSS 143 – Computer Programming II and corequisite CSSSKL 143 – Computer Programming Skills II
(CSS 142* and corequisite CSSSKL 142; or CSE 142*; or a minimum score of 4 on the AP Computer Science A exam)
* A minimum grade of 2.7 in either course is required.
(CSS 133; CSS 143 and corequisite CSSSKL 143; CSE 143; CSS 162; or CSS 173)
(330; CSS 173 or CSS 143 and corequisite CSSSKL 143; CSS 360)
5 credits – Complete 1 course from this list:
BBUS 479 Special Topics in Management, Only counts when approved for concentration; see your advisor before registering.
CSS 475 – Database Systems (CSS 360 or B IMD 351)
CSS 478 – Usability & User-Centered Design (CSS 360 or B IMD 351)
CSS 480 – Principles of Human Computer Interaction (CSS 360)
Before you can register for the capstone courses, you must complete all core courses and meet with your advisor to file a graduation application .
pathwayLabels: Only counts when approved for concentration; see your advisor before registering.
